ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full path to the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last modified */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last accessed */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the file */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Group ID of the file owner */,
  "file_mode" TEXT /* File type and mode in octal, Unix style */,
  "is_read_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is read-only */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical storage location of the file */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is archived */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is encrypted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the group belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file type is binary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user/group has read permission */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user/group has write permission */,
  "execute_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user/group has execute permission */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is inherited from a parent directory */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who set the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_permissions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_permissions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the file was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the file */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
